column1: I bought the Sony WH-1000XM5 headphones last month and they are absolutely incredible. The noise cancellation is the best I have ever experienced. Battery life lasts the full 30 hours as advertised. The sound quality is rich and detailed. Highly recommend to anyone looking for premium wireless headphones.

Very disappointed with the Samsung Galaxy A54. The battery drains within 6 hours of normal usage. The camera is mediocre despite Samsung claims. Customer support was unhelpful when I raised the issue. Would not recommend this phone to anyone.

The Apple AirPods Pro sound quality is fantastic and the fit is comfortable. However Amazon delivered a damaged box and one earbud had a scratch. The product from Apple is great but delivery experience by Amazon was really poor.

Bosch washing machine has been working flawlessly for 8 months now. The quick wash cycle saves so much time and the clothes come out perfectly clean. Very energy efficient too. Great purchase from Bosch.

Totally unhappy with this Philips air fryer. It stopped heating after just 2 weeks of use. The build quality feels very cheap for the price. Philips customer care asked me to ship it at my own cost. Never buying Philips again.

The Kindle Paperwhite from Amazon is a game changer for reading. The screen is crystal clear even in bright sunlight. Battery lasts weeks on a single charge. The library integration with Amazon Prime Reading is excellent.

Disappointed with OnePlus Nord CE 3. The phone heats up significantly during gaming and even regular use. OnePlus promised 3 years of software updates but the latest update has slowed down my phone considerably.

Absolutely love this Logitech MX Master 3 mouse. The ergonomics are perfect for long work sessions. The scroll wheel is buttery smooth. Works seamlessly across my MacBook and Windows laptop. Worth every penny.
